name: Premier Care Transports LLC
registry_source: Texas Secretary of State / Comptroller (not located via public search)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record matches 'Premier Care Transports' at 209 Ridgecrest Dr, Cedar Hill, TX 75104. SAFER wildcard search '*PREMIER CARE*' returned only PREMIER CARE INDUSTRIES (Hauppauge, NY) -- not a match. Address 209 Ridgecrest Dr is residential. A website premiercaretransports.com exists for a Dallas-Fort Worth-based courier/medical delivery service (not necessarily this entity). Yahoo Local lists business type as 'Transportation for the Disabled.' Texas SOS/Comptroller search blocked by captcha; no opencorporates match for the exact name. Likely a small intrastate NEMT operator with no USDOT registration required.

name: Need-A-Lift
inc_date: 2004 (business founding year; formal SOS filing date not retrievable via INBiz public search)
entity_status: active (operating per company website and Yelp listing updated May 2026)
registry_source: Indiana Secretary of State / INBiz (specific filing record not located)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER carrier record found for 'Need-A-Lift' in Indianapolis, IN. SAFER wildcard '*NEED A LIFT*' returned only 6 unrelated carriers (Gary IN auto, Clarksville TN crane, Buckley WA forklift, Rockport ME, Elk Grove CA, N Wilkesboro NC) -- none in Indianapolis. Company is a privately-owned non-emergency medical/wheelchair transport operator at 8237 Indy Ln, Indianapolis IN 46214, phone (317) 244-1314. Founded 2004 (per company website). Operates as a private common carrier in Marion, Hendricks, Hamilton, Johnson, Hancock, Boone, and Morgan counties -- intrastate-only operations may not require USDOT registration.

name: Petermann
officers: unknown (owned by National Express LLC / Durham School Services parent group; per task context now Summit School Services)
registry_source: Ohio Secretary of State (per BBB confirmation of LLC formation date); FMCSA SAFER for carrier record
notes: Input address '1033 Kelly Ave, Akron, OH 44306' is the Petermann Bus Akron terminal/yard (serves Akron Public Schools with ~34 buses across 31+ routes). However, the legal carrier entity is PETERMANN LTD headquartered in Cincinnati under USDOT 821384, which covers the entire Petermann fleet across Ohio operating locations (Akron, Cincinnati, etc.). Power Units 1,395 and Drivers 1,348 reflect the consolidated PETERMANN LTD carrier operation, not just the Akron yard. Safety rating Satisfactory as of 10/29/2008. Petermann is now part of National Express / Durham School Services / Summit School Services group. Carries passengers including students. Confidence high on USDOT match for the legal entity; the Akron-specific subset is a fleet location under the same USDOT.

name: Antelope Valley Sch Trnsprtn
inc_date: 1980-07-01 (Joint Powers Authority formation by member school districts)
officers: unknown (governed by member-district board: Antelope Valley Union HSD, Westside Union SD, Lancaster SD)
registry_source: California Department of Education / JPA founding documents (not a private corporate filing - public agency)
notes: Antelope Valley Schools Transportation Agency (AVSTA) is a public Joint Powers Authority formed July 1, 1980 by member school districts -- NOT a private corporation, so not in CA SOS business registry. Listed in CA Dept of Education as district CDS 19401470000000. USDOT 2808416 registered September 2015. Classified under 'Local Gov't' and 'School Bus' categories. Carrier is intrastate-only, NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire. No federal safety rating assigned (typical for school bus operators). Input address '48303 20th St W, Lancaster, CA 93534' appears to be a secondary location; the FMCSA-registered HQ is 670 W Avenue L8, Lancaster, CA 93534 (their current facility completed 1988). Fleet of ~200-234 buses serves ~6,000+ students across ~85 routes per public sources. As a public JPA tuck-in target, would require different acquisition mechanics than a private corporation.
